title: Postural Stability and Body Weight Distribution in Sportsmen
author: Jitka Marencakova
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qp8dvrw

steps.title: 60 s of one-leg stance - the second leg
steps.instruction: 60 s of one-leg stance - the second leg

steps.title: Register
steps.instruction: Register: 1) percentage of body weight distribution form narrow stance test. 2) total travelled way of COP during one-leg stance test for both legs.

steps.title: Save footprints from one-leg stance test for both legs
steps.instruction: Save footprints from one-leg stance test for both legs.

steps.title: Use 2D analysis software for Chippaux-Smirak...
steps.instruction: Use 2D analysis software for Chippaux-Smirak Index calculation from saved footprints following the Guidelines .

steps.title: Repeat each of the test 3...
steps.instruction: Repeat each of the test 3 times and let the participant rest for 60 s in a relaxed position after every test.
